title: The Original Work: Alpha Edition
description: The Original Work Alpha is a fresh reinterpretation of the beloved texture pack, The Original Work, this time infused with an alpha-style Minecraft visual theme. It captures the spirit
body:
![alpha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70100a3e9a24d9c7bfe56ec34d222e5dcc8020c4.png)

#  The Original Work Alpha

The Original Work Alpha is a new iteration of The Original Work, reimagined in an alpha-style aesthetic. This version embraces a raw, experimental look, bringing a more unfinished yet uniquely stylized feel to your Minecraft world. While staying true to the foundation of the original pack, The Original Work Alpha introduces subtle changes that give it a distinct, early-development charm. Perfect for players who enjoy a more rugged, prototype-like visual experience!

Requires:

[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[Entity Textures Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)

or Optifine
